flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Saint Cloud State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.2k vs 7.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Saint Cloud State University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (6.1k → 5.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Saint Cloud State University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (47.2% → 40.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Cloud State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.2k → $10.2k).
